review_title: Feature rich CRM for realtors at an affordable price
description: I highly recommend LionDesk to any Realtor looking for an affordable CRM with essential features.
author: Sheryl S.
pros: LionDesk can do most things a good CRM can do. Drip campaigns are very easy to set up. It helps me to respond back to potential leads quickly. It offers lower fees than most of the competitors in the market.
cons: The software can be glitchy at times and the customer support needs improvement. I had a poor experience syncing contacts and leads into the system but the issue was resolved after reaching out to the support.

review_title: LionDesk Has Been A Great Buy For Me!
description: Better lead management with my database. When leads come in from FB they go straight into a custom text/email campaign and don't fall through the cracks. The platform is clean and easy to navigate and I like the format a lot. I highly recommend the product. It's clear this company is going to continue to roll out with innovative and good upgrades to the software. Looking forward to seeing them.
author: Jason G.
pros: I love this platform so far. It has been very user friendly and has most of the features I want for a very reasonable price. Innovation of new features seems to be at the front of mind for the company, which I look forward to seeing and trying out.
cons: I really would like the option to use a straight to voice mail call feature. This would be great. The inclusion of an auto-dial feature would also be incredible. I'd love to see the creation of a social media digital management add on so that we could hire a social media manager that already has access to our database. Another cool feature I've never seen a CRM tackle is helping agents complete missing information on their clients. Like a people finder service that assists in helping to update old contact info, etc. Last item I really want which should actually be my first item is a monthly automated home value email that goes out to my database and gives them a monthly market snapshot type thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I wish I could give it 0 stars
description: Overall, I have zero trust. And why would I keep using a software with zero trust? They hurt my livelihood, and that's unacceptable.
author: Rémy C.
pros: Chat is available, although not much help
cons: From the beginning, there were issues. The how-to articles and videos don't match what's online so the learning curve is huge. There was no glossary to figure out what the different terms mean, and the terms were very confusing. Technical glitches were highly disruptive, and most often a tekkie would get back to me and ask, "What's the problem?" (I think they'd go in and fix it, and then pretend it didn't exist.) All gaslighting, trying to make me feel like I was losing my mind, and it happened quite a few times. The deal breaker? They had "system wide issues" and a broadcast that I sent out to my list texted my leads 12 times an hour! Some of my leads were texting me back saying, "Make it stop!" Whether they fixed their system issues or not, I just can't risk burning out my client base and breaking the trust I'd built up. Plus, I had to stop my Facebook ads because I couldn't risk any more glitches. I had to move to a different CRM.

description: Totally tricked into a "FREE Trial" on the phone and told that they have the ability to set up custom data fields. After I gave them my credit card assuming it was to hold my "free trial" I was charged $39 and promptly told on the next line where I was setting up the solution that actually they cant do what the sales guy said and guess what??? No refunds! Had the solution less than 5 minutes and was tricked into signing up, customer service is the worst and their policies are terrible. Left a bad taste in my mouth enough to take the time to tell others to BEWARE...
author: Brian M.
pros: It is an out of the box solution that most Realtors would get a benefit from using assuming they do not need a custom solution.
cons: It does not allow custom data fields i.e. timeline, areas of interest, loan program etc. Also I wanted to use my own number which you have to either purchase from them or use your own (I had a Twilio number) and even with my number once I selected to use it with Liondesk they charge you to take it back even though I own the number. Using your own number is important when using SMS with leads.

description: Great service and Team . Really enjoy using LionDesk.
author: Yvette F.
pros: Integrating with my business was easy and the different features as well
cons: There is nothing I would say I least liked about LionDesk, but I would intergrade videos . That would be a nice feature to have inn our industry.

author: Marshall R.
pros: Liondesks features sound like great user friendly features, in theory. The thought of using them is great... Then you get into the system and they dont work or they dont communicate seamlessly.
cons: Features often didn't work, accounts dont connect, there's a cap on how many emails and texts you can send, you end up double tracking more than actually accomplishing what you want to do. I HATE the no cancellation clause. I pre-paid a year after a sales pitch and regretted it instantly. I tried to cancel within two weeks. They would not refund any of the over $700 I paid. If you're going to try LionDesk DO YOURSELF A FAVOR AND ONLY GO MONTH TO MONTH! See if it works for your needs. Our RealGeeks site ended updoing 95% of what I needed LionDesk to do and for what I needed LionDesk to do, it was bad at it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great resource to have for real estate professionals.
description: great value, more features available than needed, but good to know its there
author: CHARLES K.
pros: Included with realtor board membership, means lower overall cost
cons: The learning curve was steep at first due to many features. But, once overcome, its great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The CRM Your Real Estate Business Needs
description: I prefer the existing version of Liondesk and am dreadfully anxious it goes away and the new beta version will fully be running. Right now we have the option to run either version. They say the best CRM in real estate is the one you use.
author: Vanessa S.
pros: The feature that I like best so far is the ability to customize a few fields. I also like the ability to edit and modify existing standard fields.
cons: The new beta version has a 180° different interface and has changed the usability of the site which is the reason why I selected Liondesk.

description: Overall good experiences! I have a few things that I would like to have changed, but for the price very good.
author: Dave F.
pros: Has the most bang for the buck that I have seen
cons: Little clunky, and not the most seem less that I have used. Not a big fan of the look of the beta version.

review_title: One of the Best CRM's that I'ved used
description: I'm staying on track with following up with clients is the best thing. I like how it is connected with products like ShowcaseIDX.
author: Jay V.
pros: The simple prewritten emails and text messages that I can send individually or to the entire account.
cons: The new version of the product is difficult to use. Video email does not get viewed.

description: Excellent for the price. Am able to use and customize email drip campaigns. Able to track all info related to last communication and set future task or todos.
author: Mike M.
pros: All the functionality needed to communicate and track leads and clients.
cons: Doesn't allow for you to choose using same email for 2 separate clients, such as when a client is also acting as a PR or Executor to another client (hence the contact info is the same, but want to keep track of separate names and addresses).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is the very best CRM for the money!
description: My overall experience is like I described above. I feel the drip campaigns prewritten on this program are more intuitive then others programs I’ve tried. This is the best CRM for the money, you definitely can’t go wrong and when I see that others I’ve referred to this program now also refer it, I know it’s great!!
author: Cyndi M.
pros: You can’t get a full CRM - database, text, and full drip Campaign - for this price!! There are even campaigns input by others if you can’t think of what to say! I love that I can have automatic feed of my new leads and get immediate contact with them from minute one! Customer service is great....either by Chat, email or phone calls. I have referred this program to others who also now refer it!
cons: The one thing I liked the least was that they don’t offer enough free texts.

description: Not great. To sum it up we are leaving the platform. There are too many glitches across the board.
author: Tanya M.
pros: Auto-drip campaigns and the integration of leads from Zillow.
cons: Everything else. It is so glitchy, takes so long to load each page and save any edits. Multiple issues with getting logged out and password not saving.

description: This is a great CRM for new or seasoned agents! It is very easy to set up and use. It has all the bells and whistles that you look for in a CRM. The price is super reasonable as well.
author: Kathy M.
pros: Ease of Use - Low Cost - Pre-set Drip Campaign's
cons: I don't like the fact I have to pay Zapier to link my email to Liondesk in order to store/record email responses.

description: I would not recommend this product to anybody. Garbage.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nothing good about this tracking. Way better products
cons: Customer service is a complete joke. Whenever you need something, the person who signs you up gives you a different phone number to call because they are no longer your account person. Then when you have issues between billing, and communicating, you wind up getting the runaround and nobody ever answers emails or gets your questions answered. They need much better customer service otherwise they are not going to make it in this market. I would not recommend this product to anybody.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Glitchy Software and Unempathetic customer service
description: Leads aren't being imported on a regular basis, as it only sometimes works. Customer service doesn't care and wont make it right. All they do is say "they strive to be the best and want to see if there is anything else they can do for you". But they don't fix anything. It's been the worst experienced with a CRM I've ever experienced. Buyer beware!
author: Trevor Y.
pros: Version 1 was a great interface. But it's not offered anymore.
cons: My imported leads sometimes are imported. Unacceptable. Customer service will not let me cancel my agreement and refund the remaining months. They also haven't even offered to import the hundreds of leads that were never imported due to their glitchy software. I've lost a ton of money due to leads slipping through the cracks.

review_title: Terrible product and worse customer service
author: Patrick M.
pros: literally nothing, there is nothing good about the product or the backend
cons: buggy, doesn't work well, confusing, ugly looking and messy feel

description: great
author: Debbie K.
pros: User friendly, great functions works well.
cons: should include texting with all packages

description: For me, the primary benefit is the support. LionDesk is as robust as I will ever need. The developers seem to want to tweak the software according to feedback. Customization available. I've tried many CRMs, have one free from my website developers, but it's too confusing.
author: Linda G.
pros: I've paid the premium monthly fee for training and support. Worth every penny. Best live support on any software that I've ever experienced.
cons: A few of the processes could be improved, extra steps between contract entry, for instance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Poor. Customer service was also almost non existent.
author: Jamie L.
pros: Ease of use in regard to video & photo additions to emails
cons: Does not efficiently integrate with RealGeeks to track user website activities, making it useless for maintaining sufficient notes on leads.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Experience has been great, has really helped with automation
author: Will H.
pros: Text feature has worked wonders with contacting people
cons: Building the drip campaigns could be easier.

description: Not satisfied
author: Gabrielle A.
pros: App accessible The ease of having the app was easy while out and meeting clients are on the road and meeting clients versus being on a computer all the time
cons: I had multiple appointments with tech services to try and get the system up to par with my needs for my business and unfortunately even with the new rollout of lion desk it’s still did not work I basically wasted my money for 3 to 6 months.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Irina S.
pros: Its easy to use it and stay on track to follow up. Ability to create own campaign and upload campaign from others. Ability to assign clients to partners.
cons: create campaign with reacquiring task. Has no automation on Birthdays or Anniversaries.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All in one CRM for Real Estate
description: LionDesk was helpful in managing my sphere and staying front and center with them with the drip campaigns.
author: Maria H.
pros: I used LionDesk for a short time, until I moved to a company who had their own CRM management software that was superior. While I was using it, I found LionDesk very useful. It had a great database feature, the drip campaigns went out seamlessly, and it was very easy to keep up with all documents imported into system.
cons: I really did not have any issues with this software. I just switched to the company provided CRM as it was superior to LionDesk.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great so far...I love the FB ad feature
author: Barbara C.
pros: Personal mentor that was available with the CRM
cons: Price to have a personal mentor available for questions...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
